notes: Window frame/sash assembly on dedicated WIN layer; repeated full-width parallel lines are mullions/sash bars, not a wall.

rationale.rule: A dedicated *WIN layer plus several parallel full-span lines at evenly spaced offsets indicates a window/mullion assembly; genuine wall lines are normally a single parallel pair (inner/outer face) rather than 4+ evenly stacked lines.
rationale.counterfactual: If the layer name lacked the WIN suffix and only two parallel lines existed at a spacing matching a standard wall thickness (100-300mm) with no intermediate mullion lines, this would read as a wall segment instead.
